ddls:
CREATE TABLE "insurance_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of insurance provider (e.g., medical, dental, vision) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the insurance provider */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the insurance provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the insurance provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the insurance provider */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the insurance provider */,
  "licensing_info" TEXT /* Licensing information of the insurance provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance plan */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance provider offering the plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance plan */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance plan (e.g., HMO, PPO, EPO) */,
  "premium" REAL /* Monthly premium of the insurance plan */,
  "deductible" REAL /* Deductible amount of the insurance plan */,
  "copay" REAL /* Copayment amount of the insurance plan */,
  "coinsurance" REAL /* Coinsurance percentage of the insurance plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_coverage" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient coverage */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance provider */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance plan */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number of the coverage */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the coverage */,
  "coverage_limit" REAL /* Coverage limit of the coverage */,
  "premium_payment_method" TEXT /* Method of premium payment (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "premium_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of premium payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_coverage_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_coverage_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES insurance_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_coverage_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES insurance_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "social_security_number" TEXT /* Social security number of the patient */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of healthcare provider (e.g., doctor, hospital) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the healthcare provider */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the healthcare provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the healthcare provider */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the healthcare provider */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the healthcare provider */,
  "npi_number" TEXT /* NPI number of the healthcare provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient coverage */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date of the claim */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount of the claim */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of claim (e.g., medical, dental, vision) */,
  "diagnosis_code" TEXT /* Diagnosis code of the claim */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Description of the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_coverage_id FOREIGN KEY ("coverage_id") REFERENCES patient_coverage ("coverage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim item */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "item_date" TEXT /* Date of the claim item */,
  "item_amount" REAL /* Amount of the claim item */,
  "service_code" TEXT /* Service code of the claim item */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Unit cost of the service */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_items_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "attachment_date" TEXT /* Date of the attachment */,
  "attachment_file" TEXT /* File name of the attachment */,
  "attachment_type" TEXT /* Type of attachment (e.g., document, image, video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_attachments_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_payments_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_status_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "status_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim after the update */,
  "status_updated_by" TEXT /* User who updated the claim status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_status_history_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)
